overrideNote: Orchestrator override: Clippy blocked by pre-existing workspace issues in truck-topology and truck-polymesh (documented in AGENTS.md). All code reviews pass. Tests and typecheck pass. Accepting milestone with lint validator red.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the `rust-worker` skill to explicitly allow mission-level exceptions when known workspace clippy failures block verification and when tightly coupled new modules or targeted fix work require tests to land alongside implementation instead of a strict red-first step.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `ve-intersection`, `fix-face-bounding-box`, and `fix-broad-phase-bopds-integration` reviews all report justified deviations from `.factory/skills/rust-worker/SKILL.md` because mission guidance already permits clippy skips for known workspace issues and some small fix/refactor flows added or adjusted tests alongside implementation.

rejectedObservations.observation: The shared library does not document that broad-phase face bounds now depend on the `FaceBoundingSurface` abstraction and require surface-bearing face payloads to capture protruding interiors, while `Face<..., ()>` still falls back to boundary sampling.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous and too implementation-specific for a general shared library entry without orchestrator guidance
